section_miscategorizations.text: A CT scan revealed findings suggestive of glomerular nephritis.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Imaging results are objective diagnostic data and belong in the Objective section, not in the Assessment, which should synthesize impressions rather than report raw test findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: Referral to an ENT specialist is indicated to consider tonsillectomy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a management decision and referral plan, which belongs in the Plan section rather than the Assessment.
